snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 07 [Eng Sub] - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 26th Mar 21
snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 07 [Eng Sub] - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 26th Mar 21

https://bit.ly/30JSSPr Har Pal Geo is now in the USA! Subscribe and hit the bell icon to continue enjoining your favorite Pakistani dramas

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.

Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?

Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad

Cast :

snippet.title: Galat (Official Video) Asees Kaur | Rubina Dilaik, Paras Chhabra | Vikas | Raj Fatehpur
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents Galat by Asees Kaur and starring Bigg Boss fans two favourite contestants - Big Boss 14 Winner Rubina Dilaik and Paras Chhabra. Keeping melancholy as the central theme of this song, the hit trio of – Vikas as composer, Sunny Vik as the producer and the lyricist Raj Fatehpur have worked their magic yet again on Galat. Directed By TRU Makers the story narrates a tale of love and betrayal, with stunning performances by Rubina and Paras as the protagonist who will compel you to see the story unfold till the end. 

Which scene or lyrics impressed you the most? Tell us in the comments below…

#VYRLOriginals #RubinaDilaik #ParasChhabra

snippet.title: Proton Saga 2021 | Pakistan ki sab say sassti sedan | First Look Review
snippet.description:
Proton Pakistan has finally launched the much-awaited sedan, Proton Saga, in a digital launch event. Saga is Proton’s second car in Pakistan, after Proton X70. Al-Haj Proton has introduced the Saga sedan in three variants, Standard MT (Manual Transmission), Standard AT (Auto Transmission), and Ace AT (Auto Transmission). An interesting part of Saga’s launch in Pakistan is that Al-Haj Motors has also introduced a Sports variant of the car but in a limited edition. This variant is called R3 for ‘Race, Rally, and Research’ to give Pakistanis a taste of Proton’s motorsports vehicles. Here's the first look review of Proton Saga, enjoy the video and tell us about the car in the comments.

snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 09 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 2nd April 21
snippet.description:
Hit the bell and subscribe to stay connected with Har Pal Geo's collection of Pakistani dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?
Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad

Cast :

Feroz Khan As Farhad
Rubina Ashraf As Bari Sarkar
Hina Bayat As Maa Ji
Junaid Khan As Sikandar

snippet.title: YAAD - Asim Azhar | Talha Anjum | Talhah Yunus (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
🎵🎵Watch the official music video of Asim Azhar's latest single featuring Talha Anjum & Talhah Yunus! 

#YAAD - #AsimAzhar | #YoungStunners | #TalhaAnjum | #TalhahYunus (Official Music Video)

🎵Get the full song! https://backl.ink/145875896

🎵Spotify: http://open.spotify.com/album/3QGrCo6L9djVTKvmFTvQPq

🎵iTunes: https://geo.itunes.apple.com/WebObjects/MZSearch.woa/wa/advancedSearch?allTitle=Yaad&entity=album&media=all&submit=seeAllLockups&at=1l3v9Tx

🎵Amazon: https://www.amazon.de/Yaad/dp/B08ZXQ3TB7/ref=sr_1_15?__mk_de_DE=%EF%BF%BDM%EF%BF%BDZ%EF%BF%BD%EF%BF%BD&dchild=1&keywords=Yaad&qid=1616676946&s=dmusic&sr=1-15&x=0&y=0

🎵Bajao: https://bajao.pk/lnk/Bsoit

Lyrics:
Asim:
Tu ye jaane tere aage majboor hain
Kis baat ka gharoor 
Faida uthai ye
Kaisa ye suroor 

Deta saadayen kyun na tujhko sunai de
Tera dewana puri dunya gawai de
Mai laparwa sar phira par bewafa nae
Kab tak ye ashiq akhir apni safai de

Tu haan kar kabhi
Mai badlu abhi
Hai meri museebat ye tera zameer
Chehra asal tu apna dikhaye jaye
Kyun phir mujhko satayi jaye

Teri bas yaad yaad yaad
Aye mujhe baar baar baar
Sone na de
Jeena na de
Aur kisi ka hone na de

Talha Anjum:
Mein bola i’m going home but,
Asal mein I’m going crazy, 
Double black for the pain,
Rollie rollie got me faded, 
You played me, haan theek hai,
I’ll be over you by the weekend,
Been in the game for 10,
Kalla mere dil ke kitni qareeb hai,
Guzaari hai gurbat mein raatein, 
Kitaabo mein milni nai baatein,
Anay walay atay ho ge,
Mujhay unki fikar hai jo nahi atay, 
Tere bin eid nai eid, chehra nai qaabil e deed,
Chehray pe fikar hai wazeh, tu chehray ko parhna tou seekh, 

Tu mujhko raastay de, mein tujhko badlay mein faaslay du,
Tu mujhko aasre de, mein dil ki tijori se raaz aik du,
Chahay phir saans lein, tere deedar aur maut qubool, 
Karu qurban tujhpe ye zindagi tou hogi har saans wusool,

Mein badlu tou banu phir kya, Kya!
Ke Tu mera ho ke bhi na
Got everything that i need, give you anything that you want, 
Yeah i smoke trees, write songs,
Teri soch, all night long,
I could right all my wrongs,
But you’re gone and..

Talhah Yunus:
Raat ye sonay k liye magar hum soye nahi,
Karwat badalte rehte sochon mai hum khoye rahay,
Yaadon k bastay liye. ankhon ko bhigoyen nai,
Khud pe ye fakhar, woh mere jaane pe roye nai,
Yaar deewar bane, Rishton mai daraar dalay,
Guzre kia saal baray, Ghum on’ k pahaar banay,
Sab ki zabaan banen, Dil ye mazaar bane,
Aa na darbaar mere, likhte raat k chaar baje,
Lafzon k taajir, hum hijrat o hijr k aadi, barsa den ye baadal,
Zamane se pucho hum kitne bahadur, wo aj bhi samjhen humein pagal,
Khud dhunden jawaab, Kiu puchu sawaal, meri kia majaal?
Vehmo gumaan, Kia du mai misaal? Tu hai bemisaaal,
Har basti ujaagar,
Hum shab k musaafir, safar bhi mutaasir,
Mai Urdu ka Rakim, nazar bari qaatil,
Hustle meri wazeh, gawah mera Asim,
Mai dunya se ajiz, likh raha teri khaatir,
Raaten ye dhalti nahi,
Waqt ki tarah kyun badalti rahi,
Maanengay woh apni ghalti nahi,
Mai aaj bhi wuhi, koi jaldi nahi...

Song Credits:
♫Music Composer: Asim Azhar
♫Rap Part Composed by: Young Stunners
♫Music Produced by: Nafeel Ali
♫Co-Producer: Mo Khan
♫Lyrics: Asim Azhar, Talha Anjum, Talhah Yunus & Raamis Ali
♫Guitars by: Dilawar Hussain
♫Mixed by: Mo Khan
♫Mastered by: Andy Walter from Abbey Road
♫Rap Vocals Mixed by: Jokhay
♫Recorded at: Kazman Productions

Video Credits:
Concept & Creative Director: Jazib Qamar
Executive Producer: Asim Azhar
Director: Asim Hussain 
DOP: Usman Malkani 
Producer: Adil Mailk 
Stills Photography: Shahbaz Shazi
Styling and Costumes: Jazib Qamar
Styling Team: Karishma & Tasbiha
Grooming, Make Up & Hair (Asim & YS): Nadeem William
Make Up: NABILA’S
Art Director: Shahzad Riaz
Asst. Art: Naeem Amin
Talent Management: Furqan Belal
Line Producer: Syed Jahanzaib Ali 
2nd Line Producer: Taha Adil Malik
Production: Kashif Rafique Gazdar 
Edit & Post: Adnan
Grade/Colorist: Tahir Moosa (Sharp Image)
Album Artwork: MZHE
Powered by: Jazib Qamar for Asim Azhar

snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 08 [Eng Sub] - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 2nd Apr 21
snippet.description:
https://bit.ly/30JSSPr Har Pal Geo is now in the USA! Subscribe and hit the bell icon to continue enjoining your favorite Pakistani dramas

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.

Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?

Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad

Cast :

Iqra Aziz As Mahi
Feroz Khan As Farhad
Rubina Ashraf As Bari Sarkar
Hina Bayat As Maa Ji
Junaid Khan As Sikandar
Mirza Zain Baig As Taimoor

Sunita Marshal As Sahiba

Momina Iqbal as Naheed

snippet.description:

Shab-e-Barat is also regarded as the Night of forgiveness or Day of Atonement. Muslims observe Mid-Sha'ban as a night of worship and salvation. Scholars including Imam Shafii, Imam Nawawi, Imam Ghazzali and Imam Suyuti have declared praying acceptable on the night of mid shaban.

About Super Dancer 4 : 
---------------------------------------------------
Now in its fourth season, Super Dancer is a popular children's dance reality show. Spearheaded by Bollywood actress Shilpa Shetty, renowned choreographer Geeta Kapoor and Bollywood Director Anurag Basu, the show looks for 'Dance ka Kal'. After nationwide auditions, the judges select 12 children who are extraordinary dancers, aged between 4 to 13. These 12 dancers are paired with popular and able choreographers, the Super Gurus. snippet.title: Mujhe Khuda Pay Yaqeen Hai - Ep 75 Teaser - 7th April 2021 - HAR PAL GEO
snippet.description:
Mujhe Khuda Pay Yaqeen Hai - Ep 75 Teaser - 7th April 2021 - HAR PAL GEO

Your favourite Pakistani dramas are just a click away! Subscribe and hit the bell icon to never miss a video from our amazing YouTube channel that is now available in the USA https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Mujhe Khuda Pay Yaqeen Hai is a story of a fight between good and evil that continues to exist since the beginning and till the end of the world. When the feelings of envy, hatred, and revenge come face to face with the pure and innocent feeling of love, the definite winner is truthfulness. This story is of a young woman, Rida who along with her husband, Hammad and two children live a blissful and happy life however welcoming Shakira and her daughter Nazneen as tenants proves to be the biggest mistake of their lives.
Consumed with a dark and secretive past, Shakira and Nazneen with their devious tricks soon begin to jeopardize Rida and Hammad’s relationship. Misunderstandings and delusions created by Shakira and Nazneen blur the bond between Hammad and Rida and their world comes crumbling down. With everything in Hammad’s life at stake, will he realize his mistakes? Will Shakira and Nazneen face the consequences of their actions? Even after Hammad’s countless mistakes and disloyalty towards Rida, will Rida be able to accept him?

Written By: Soofia Khurram
Directed By: Saleem Ghanchi
Produced By: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment

Cast :
Agha Ali
Nimra Khan

Gul E Rana

snippet.title: Mystifying Glasses | C.I.D | सीआईडी | Real Heroes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Crime: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzXpAx4v6rFLYXkJZ5nmSvQ?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of real heroes: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL0y08jtgaKIVIYFOZ8qi-3qMLgI8sKQmY

People are supporting a lady over Domestic Violence and as the offence at the area go down with peace. There an incident takes place where an attack has been violated. People are rushing over the mystery of danger in the locality with the profound mystery of mystic goggles. What is happening around? Where is the Culprit? What is the tragedy behind mysterious specs? Will CID be able to find the Culprit?
Find out, what happens next!

About CID:
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues

People are supporting a lady over Domestic Violence and as the offence at the area go down with peace. There an incident takes place where an attack has been violated. People are rushing over the mystery of danger in the locality with the profound mystery of mystic goggles. What is happening around? Where is the Culprit? What is the tragedy behind mysterious specs? Will CID be able to find the Culprit?
Find out, what happens next!

About CID:
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues

snippet.title: Best Of CID | सीआईडी | Clustrophobia | Full Episode
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: http://www.youtube.com/sonypalindia

Watch More CID Episodes: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLfyXOEyr93G0MM1QMSnGwbCTP8aU6oTz7
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

A judge who happens to be ACP Pradyuman’s childhood friend, gets the shock of his life when he comes to know about his grandson’s kidnapping. The kidnappers want a judgment in their favour in return for the grandson. The judge refuses to comply but has very little time save his grandson. Will he crack and do what the criminals say in an attempt to save his grandson? 

About CID: 
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. the team faces non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues.

More Useful Links :
* Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
* Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV

snippet.title: Bepanah Pyaar (Official Video) Payal Dev, Yasser Desai | Surbhi Chandna, Sharad Malhotra | Shabbir A
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals brings to you Bepanah Pyaar composed and sung by Payal Dev collaborating up with the talented singer Yasser Desai for the first time. Reuniting after their successful pairing together in Naagin 5, Surbhi Chandna & Sharad Malhotra’s sizzling chemistry is sure make you fall in love with them all over again. This beautiful romantic song has been written by veteran Bollywood lyricist Shabbir Ahmed and Payal Dev.

#VYRLOriginals #SurbhiChandna #SharadMalhotra

Directed by Arif Khan, the stunning video narrates a thrilling story of love, treachery and action with a surprising plot twist in the end. Do comment & mention below your favourite #sharbhi moments from the video.

snippet.title: Baalveer Returns - Ep 334 - Full Episode - 2nd April, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of Baalveer Returns: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Yx-rSymwv5NSIsaQ0RwDK_

Episode 334: Bhyamar and Ray surrender to Baalveer
--------------------------------------------------------
Bhyamar and Ray have surrendered to Balveer but Vivan feels that Baalveer's life is in danger. So he and all the pari's go in search in of Baalveer watch the full episode to know more.

About Baalveer Returns:
---------------------------------------
After Pari-lok, the home of benevolent fairies was destroyed by a mighty evil, Timnasa. Baalveer takes shelter in Veer-lok along with a few Paris who had survived the massacre. There, under the guidance of the wise old white lion Shaurya, Baalveer and Pari's are instructed to find the successor of Baalveer at the earliest, since he was immensely injured during the war and will need to team up a new Baalveer to further fight the battle with evil. This search for the next Baalveer takes them to earth, where they discover Vivan, who lives in an old society of Mumbai. He is the naughtiest kid, an ardent fan of Salman Khan, and a non-believer of Baalveer and his powers. This adds to the misery of Baalveer because unfortunately, this undisciplined, non-believer kid is the real successor of Baalveer. What follows is the challenging journey of Baalveer and his team to make Vivaan the next Baalveer with some eccentric characters, childish games and lots of magic on earth and the respective loks, while the imminent threat of Timnasa and the mystery behind her origin continues to play a part.

snippet.title: 🔴 SAMAA News Live | Samaa TV Live | 24/7 Pakistan News Live Headlines, Bulletins & Press Conferences
snippet.description:
#samaanewslive #pakistannews #livestreaming

LIVE STREAM SAMAA TV  24/7 | live streaming on YouTube | Headlines , Bulletins, Special & Exclusive Coverage 

Stay up-to-date on the major news making headlines across Pakistan on SAMAA TV’s top of the hour segment. For in-depth coverage watch the bulletins.

SAMAA TV is Pakistan’s first private satellite news channel that provides live transmission simultaneously from five cities of Pakistan: Karachi, Lahore, Islamabad, Quetta and Peshawar. 

SAMAA’s live news bulletins, incisive political talk shows and a wide range of programs including sports, social issues and infotainment has enabled it to position itself among the top tier news and current affairs channels of Pakistan.

snippet.title: Shab E Barat Ko 5 Elaichi Par Amal Karen | Ghar Mein Dolat Paisa Barse Ga
snippet.description:
Today this video is about to the Elaichi or cardamom put into the 5 different places then see result. Shab e barat ko 5 elaichi ka ye amal karen. Ghar mein dolat atay dekho ge. At the night of shab e barat you should do this act on 5 cardamom. As you know cardamom is use for many things but if you increase your income, salary or money then you should use this for it. You should recite 3 surah of Quran 1 ayat and 2 names of ALLAH on elaichi and keep into your kitchen, office, hall, wallet then see the miracle. All of your money problems disapears and your home will be very blessed insha ALLAH.
Shab e barat is coming and you do not forget to do this amal. Thanks
#daily #URDU #update

snippet.title: Virat Kohli के निशाने पर अब होंगे Pakistan के Babar Azam, T-20 Ranking में Top-5 में पहुंचे विराट
snippet.description:
LIVE TV देखने के लिए इस लिंक पर क्लिक करें: https://www.tv9hindi.com/live-tv
ICC ने T20 की ताजा रैंकिंग जारी कर दी है. और इस नई रैकिंग में भारतीय कप्तान विराट कोहली (Virat Kohli) ने लंबी छलांग लगाते हुए बल्लेबाजों की लिस्ट में टॉप 5 में अपनी जगह बना ली है. हालांकि इस रैंकिग में एक बार फिर पाकिस्तान के बल्लेबाज बाबर आजम भारतीय बल्लबाजों पर भारी पड़े है..
जहां इंग्लैंड के खिलाफ T20 सीरीज (T-20 Series) में अब तक केएल राहुल का प्रदर्शन कुछ खास नहीं रहा है..जिसका खामियाजा उन्हें बल्लेबाजों की रैंकिंग में नीचे खिसककर उठाना पड़ा है..वहीं अब इसका फायदा पाकिस्तान के बल्लेबाज को मिला है
#ViratKohli #BabarAzam #ICCT20Ranking #KLRahul

Credit : #Sports | Himanshu/Producer | Manish/Editor | #TV9D

snippet.title: Size Zero (2021) NEW RELEASED Full Hindi Dubbed South Movie | Anushka Shetty, Arya & Prakash Raj
snippet.description:
Soundarya aka Sweety is an overweight, brave and an independent woman. She is slightly conscious about her weight but does not let it affect her. She falls in love with Abhishek, who was once a prospective groom for her but they both reject each other. However, both Sweety and Abhi continue to remain friends and together take on the Wight Loss clinics Mafia, Sathyanand (Prakash Raj). 

Censor Certification Number:- VIL/2/41/2021-MUM
Movie (Hindi Dubbed):- Size Zero 
Original Movie Name: Size Zero in Telugu
StarCast:- Anushka Shetty, Arya, Prakash Raj, Sonal Chauhan 
Music:- M. M. Keeravani

Director:- Prakash Kovelamudi

snippet.title: स्पाइक द हेजहोग-मैन 👦 Spike The Hedgehog-man 🌜 Bedtime Story in Hindi | WOA Fairy Tales
snippet.description:
स्पाइक द हेजहोग-मैन 👦 Spike The Hedgehog-man 🌜 Bedtime Story in Hindi | WOA Fairy Tales
लोग WOA फेयरी टेल्स पर अधिक कहानियां देख सकते हैं
- हिंदी:- सभी वीडियो: https://bit.ly/2IUIMnW 

#वोआफेयरीटेल्सइंग्लिश    
#वोआफेयरीटेल्स
#इंग्लिशफेयरीटेल्स

फेयरी टेल्स चैनल बच्चों के लिए दिलचस्प परी कथा कहानियां प्रदान करता है जो रचनात्मक और रंगीन तरीके से दिखाई जाती  हैं। इसके अलावा, इन सब में शैक्षिक बातें भी शामिल हैं जिसका उद्देश्य आपके बच्चों को स्वाभाविक रूप से और धीरे से शिक्षित करना है। हमारी सूचि को इन श्रेणियों में विभाजित किया गया है: कल्पित, लोककथा, जादुई, पौराणिक, किंवदंती और कथाएं जो हर विशिष्ट प्लेलिस्ट में पाई जा सकती हैं। आशा है कि आप सभी हमारे चैनल का आनंद लेंगे और नए अपलोड किए गए वीडियो की सूचना प्राप्त करने के लिए कृपया सब्सक्राइब करें । 


अस्वीकरण                                                                                                                                                                                               
► WOA फेयरी टेल्स - हिंदी और इसके सभी वीडियो शीर्षक 16 C.F.R के अर्थ में "बच्चों को निर्देशित नहीं" हैं। §312.2 बच्चों की ऑनलाइन गोपनीयता सुरक्षा अधिनियम (यूएसए) 13 वर्ष से कम उम्र के बच्चों के लिए नहीं है। WOA फेयरी टेल्स - हिंदी और उसके मालिक (ओं), एजेंटों, प्रतिनिधियों, और कर्मचारियों ने 13 वर्ष से कम उम्र के बच्चों से कोई जानकारी एकत्र नहीं की और 13 वर्ष से कम उम्र के बच्चों से जानकारी एकत्र करने के लिए किसी भी तीसरे पक्ष को स्पष्ट रूप से अनुमति नहीं दी। WOA फेयरी टेल्स की ओर से - हिंदी। इसके अलावा, WOA फेयरी टेल्स - हिंदी, YouTube और इसके एजेंटों और सहायक कंपनियों, या किसी भी अन्य संबद्ध तीसरे पक्ष की प्रथाओं और नीतियों, डेटा संग्रह के बारे में किसी भी और सभी दायित्व या जिम्मेदारी से इनकार करता है।       इस चैनल में सभी ऑडियो और विज़ुअल कंटेंट SCONNECT CO, LTD, audiojungle.net के स्वामित्व में हैं और क्रिएटिव कॉमन्स रिविज़न के तहत लाइसेंस प्राप्त हैं।

snippet.title: Beintehaa | बेइंतहा | Episode 23 | Zain Harasses Aaliya | Colors Rishtey
snippet.description:
Zain keeps harassing Aaliya by playing pranks on her. Zain deliberately distracts Aaliya's attention and she ends up scorching the iron into her blouse. Osman suggests a wedding reception.


The series revolves around the lives of Zain and Aliya, two lovers whose families are sworn enemies. What happens when the past of your family members haunts your future with your loved one? Can real love triumph over family rivalry?

#Beintehaa   #बेइंतहा   #ColorsRishtey   #Voot   #HarshadArora

snippet.title: Is Abhijeet Really Dead? | C.I.D | सीआईडी | Real Heroes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Crime: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzXpAx4v6rFLYXkJZ5nmSvQ?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of real heroes: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL0y08jtgaKIVIYFOZ8qi-3qMLgI8sKQmY

An Incident on road has taken place, Abhijeet is captured in the subtle moment is believed by all CID Members as Dead, But than Incidents kept happening and CID Team find themselves in Danger. What is happening with them? Will CID be able to find the Culprit?

About CID:
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues

snippet.title: The ICE (End of life). Buner vines new video 2021
snippet.description:
Side effects of ICE (METH HARM)

SHORT-TERM EFFECTS

Loss of appetite

Increased heart rate, blood pressure, body temperature

Dilation of pupils

Disturbed sleep patterns

Nausea

Bizarre, erratic, sometimes violent behavior

Hallucinations, hyperexcitability, irritability

Panic and psychosis

Convulsions, seizures and death from high doses

LONG-TERM EFFECTS

Permanent damage to blood vessels of heart and brain, high blood pressure leading to heart attacks, strokes and death

Liver, kidney and lung damage

Destruction of tissues in nose if sniffed

Respiratory (breathing) problems if smoked

Infectious diseases and abscesses if injected

Malnutrition, weight loss

Severe tooth decay

Disorientation, apathy, confused exhaustion

Strong psychological dependence

Psychosis

Depression

snippet.title: Mystery Behind The White Mask | C.I.D | सीआईडी | Real Heroes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Crime: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzXpAx4v6rFLYXkJZ5nmSvQ?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of real heroes: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL0y08jtgaKIVIYFOZ8qi-3qMLgI8sKQmY

There is some serious hullabaloo going on in a Locality. A family comes over in search of a new house. As they look at the place, they get warned by an old man of not staying here. Then Team CID comes to have a look at the Spot. ACP Pradyuman along with the others hatches a plan. There he comes face to face with the Strategist. But will this faceoff lead to something serious? watch full episode.

The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues

But will this faceoff lead to something serious? watch full episode.

About CID:
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues

snippet.title: KAB AAOGE MOLA - MESUM ABBAS | MUNAJAT IMAM E ZAMANA 2021 | MANQABAT IMAM MAHDI | YA MEHDI MADADI
snippet.description:
"Kab Apni ZIyarat Karaaoge Mola, Kab Aaoge Mola..." - New 2021 Manqabat / Munajat e Imam e Zamana (atfs) by Mesum Abbas.

کب اپنی زیارت کراؤگے مولاؑ
‏کب آؤگے مولاؑ، کب آؤگے مولاؑ

"Ya Mahdi Madadi, Ya Mehdi Madadi!" (atfs) - Dua e Imam e Zamana Kalam - 15 Shaban Manqabat by Mesum Abbas 2021.

Subscribe to this Channel : http://bit.ly/MesumAbbasOfficial

Listen to 'Kab Aaoge Mola' the New Munajat e Imam e Zamana by Mesum Abbas 2021 for 15 Shaban Manqabat on the birth of Imam Mehdi (atfs). 

After Chale Aao Ae Ibne Mushkil Kusha, a Special New Munajat/Manqabat for Imam Mahdi (as) is recited by Mesum Abbas Naqvi and penned by Mir Hilal Rizvi (India). Dua e Imam e Zamana.

#Munajat #KabAaogeMola #ImamMahdi
👉🏻LYRICS INCLUDED BELOW

Video Details:
Isteghaasa / Shikwa recited by Mesum Abbas
👉🏻Reciter: Mesum Abbas 2021
👉🏻Poet: Mir Hilal Rizvi (India)
👉🏻Composition: Amanat Ali Khan (Sonu)
👉🏻Backing Vocals: Khan Brothers (Munawwer Ali, Rajab Ali, Sonu & Monu)
👉🏻Arrangement: Aamir Qureshi
👉🏻Audio Recording: Ovais Qureshi 
👉🏻Mix/Mastered: M. Omar Qureshi (ODS - Karachi)
👉🏻Director: Saroj Bunty (New Jersey, USA)
👉🏻Video Edit & Post: Ali Arman Baltistani (Tna Records)
👉🏻Cover Design: Yawer Abbas Damani
👉🏻English Subtitles: Ahmad Virani (USA)
👉🏻Label: Goldenn Records
👉🏻Social Media Management: Azaad Media
👉🏻Sarparast: Syed Baqar Naqvi

Ya Mahdi Madadi, Ya Mehdi Madadi…

Al Ajal Al Ajal Al Ajal…

Hawa e Karam Kab Chalaoge Maula
Diye Zulm Ke Kab Bujhaoge Maula
Ye Ghaybat Kahan Tak Barhaaoge Maula
Kab Apni Ziyarat Karaoge Maula

Kab Apni Ziyarat Karaoge Mola, Kab Aaoge Mola Kab Aaoge Mola
Judai Mai Kab Tak Rulaaoge Mola, Kab Aaoge Mola Kab Aaoge Mola

Hui Ek Muddat Sitam Sehte Sehte
      Zabaan Thak Chuki Al Ajal Kehte Kehte
      Hamay Kab Ghamon Se Churdhaoge Mola…Kab Aaoge Mola
 
2)   Areezon Ko Kab Tak Waseela Banayen
      Tumhe Haal e Dil Saamne Ab Sunayen
      Kab In Faaslon Ko Mitaaoge Mola… Kab Aaoge Maula

3)   Wilayat Ko Zakhmi Kiye Jaarahe Hain
      Sab Ek Doosre Se Laray Jaa Rahe Hain
      Kab Aapas Main Inko Milaaoge Mola… Kab Aaoge Mola

4)   Zahoor Aap Ka Hoga Kis Roz Jaane
      Dua e Faraj Hai Labon Par Hamare
      Asar Kab Duaon Mai Laaoge Mola… Kab Aaogay Mola

5)   Ye Dil Misle Hur Hai Pareeshaan Hamara
      Hussain Aap Ban Kar Batao Khudara
      Galay Se Hamay Kab Lagaao Ge Mola… Kab Aaoge Mola

6)   Hai Halat Bhi Ab Misle Yaqoob Dekho
      Hamari Umeedon Ke Yusuf Tumhi Ho
      Taras Kab In Aankhon Pe Khaaoge Mola… Kab Aaoge Mola

7)   Baqayya Mai Kab Tak Andhera Rahega
      Dil e Fatima Ko Sukoon Kab Milega
      Diya Qabr Pe Kab Jalaaoge Mola… Kab Aaoge Mola

8)   Rahenge Yunhi Kab Talak Ashk Jaari
      Shab e Hijr Kab Khatm Hogi Hamari
      Chiraaghe Sahar Kab Jalaaoge Mola… Kab Aaoge Mola

9)   Hilal aur Mesum Bahate Hain Ansoo
      Sajay Hain Janazon Ke Bazaar Har Su
      Kya Ghaibat Se Ab Bhi Na Aaoge Mola… Kab Aaoge Mola

Munajat Manqabat Imam Mehdi video by Mesum Abbas reciting Kab Aaoge Mola (Official Video). © 2021 Mesum Abbas
tags: chale aao ae ibne mushkil kusha

Promotions - Underdog Digital



Lyrics -
Karda rahen ignore ve mainu
Labhgyi lagda hor ve tenu
Je tu pyar naal rakhna hi nahi 
Fer tu vapis tor ve mainu
Ik paasa karde yaar.. Asi tere nahi rehna
Marjaaneya tu hun nahi karda pyar..Asi tere nahi rehna

Tethon ramdev ton ve routine nahi chadya janda
Tu reliance chalauna hain..Tethon time nai kadhya janda
Tethon ramdev ton ve routine nahi chadya janda
Tu reliance chalauna hain..Tethon time nai kadhya janda

Kade bahr laja
Koi film dikha
Kade pyar naal
Koi gal sunaa
Banya rehnaa talwar asi tere nai rehna
Marjaneya
Tu hun nahi karda pyar asi tere nai rehna

Koi labh lyi hou chudail 
Chakkar koi paaya lagda
Sade pichon ve muuh
Kaala karvaaya lagda
Koi labh lyi hou chudail 
Chakkar koi paaya lagda
Sade pichon ve muuh
Kaala karvaaya lagda

Sanu milna nahi 
Milauna nahi
Babbu je pyar
Jatauna nahi
Ki pauna fer achaar Asi tere nahi rehna
Marhanevala
Tu hun nahi karda pyar asi tere nai rehna



#NehaKakkar #RubinaDilaik #AbhinavShukla

snippet.title: Shabe Barat Kalam - Jaga Ji Lagane ki Dunya Nahi Hai - Hafiz Tahir Qadri 2021
snippet.description:
This video specially published on the blessed occasion of Shabe Baraat.

This video is sponsored by Bin Hashim Pharmacy & Supermarket.
For details please visit : https://binhashimonline.pk/
Facebook page : https://www.facebook.com/binhashim.supermarket/

Artist: Hafiz Tahir Qadri
Audio : @R W D S 
Video: @Ajwa Production 
Edit by : Qazi Shaheer

Lyrics:

Tu Khushi ky phul ly gaa kb talak
Tu yahan zinda rhy gaa kb talak
1 din mRNA ha akhir moot ha
KR ly Jo krna hai akhir moot ha

Jagaji lagany ki duniya nahi ha
Ya ibrat ki jaan ha tamasha nahi ha

Jahan main hai ibrat ky har su namuny 
Magar tujh ko andha kia raang o buu ny...
Kbhi gour sy ye bhi dakha ha tu ny
Jo abad thy wo mehal ab Hain Sony

Jagaji lagany ki duniya nahi ha
Ye ibrat ki jaan ha tamasha nahi ha

Mily khak main ahl e shaan kesy kesy 
Makeen ho gay laa makan kesy kesy 
Huwy naamwar ny nishaan kesy kesy 
Zameen kha gae noo jawan kesy kesy??
Yahi tujh ko dhun ha rahu San sy ala 
Ho zinat nirali ho fashion nirala
Jiya krta ha Kya yuhi mrny wala??
Tujy Husn e Zahir ny dhoky main dala 

Jagaji lagany ki duniya nahi ha
Ye ibrat ki jaan ha tamasha nahi ha
Qabar main mayat utarni ha zarur 

Jesi krni wesi bhrni ha zrur 
Dabdaba duniya main hi rah jay gaa 
Hussan tera khak main mill jay ga 
Bey namazi Teri shamat aye gii 
Qabar ki diwar mill hi Jay gii 
Toor Dy gi Qabar Teri pasliyan
Dono haton ki Mily Jo ungliyan
Landon or Pairas ky sapny chor Dy
Bsss Madiny sy hi rishty joor ly
Bey Wafa duniya py mt kar aitabar 
Tu achanak moot ka ho gaa shikar 
KR ly Toba Rab عزوجل ki rehmat ha Bari
Qabar main wrna saza ho gii Kari 

Tujy phly bachpan main barooo khilaya 
Jawani ny phir tujh ko majnu banaya 
Burhapy ny phir ahh!! Kya Kya sataya??
Ajal tera KR Dy gi bilkul safaya
Ajal ny naa chora kisra naa Dara 
Esi sy Sikandar sifataien bhi Hara
Har ak ha ky naa Kya Kya hasrat sadara 
Para rh gya sab yuhi thate Sara 

Jagaji lagany ki duniya nahi ha
Ye ibrat ki jaan ha tamasha nahi ha

Notice: 
Copy and reupload anything from our content is a crime and result can be given in legal way so be careful and avoid using our content anywhere.

#JagaJiLaganeKi #HafizTahirQadri #ShabeBaraat

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! 👀


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ► https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ►https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ►https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

Parent’s Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

snippet.title: Hyundai Elantra 2021 | First Look Review | PakWheels
snippet.description:
Hyundai Nishat Motors has finally launched the much-awaited sedan, the Hyundai Elantra. Elantra is Hyundai’s second car in Pakistan, after Hyundai Tucson. Hyundai Pakistan has launched the 6th generation of Elantra in one variant, GLS. The company will hopefully introduce more variants in the future.
The company has added the price tag of 4,049,000 rupees on its first sedan car, which is almost the same as its direct competitors, Corolla and Civic, but almost double the price of Alsvin. Bookings for Elantra open today the 22nd of March. 

👉Find specs & feature: https://www.pakwheels.com/new-cars/hyundai/elantra/

snippet.title: Baalveer Returns - Ep 333 - Full Episode - 1st April, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of Baalveer Returns: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Yx-rSymwv5NSIsaQ0RwDK_

Episode 333: Baalveer Tries To Defeat Timnasa
--------------------------------------------------------
Baalveer knows a place from where he can get the White Diamond but Baal Pari and Shaurya insist him to not go, Baalveer refuses and makes a move. Will Baalveer save the world? Stay Tuned to know what happens

About Baalveer Returns:
---------------------------------------
After Pari-lok, the home of benevolent fairies was destroyed by a mighty evil, Timnasa. Baalveer takes shelter in Veer-lok along with a few Paris who had survived the massacre. There, under the guidance of the wise old white lion Shaurya, Baalveer and Pari's are instructed to find the successor of Baalveer at the earliest, since he was immensely injured during the war and will need to team up a new Baalveer to further fight the battle with evil. This search for the next Baalveer takes them to earth, where they discover Vivan, who lives in an old society of Mumbai. He is the naughtiest kid, an ardent fan of Salman Khan, and a non-believer of Baalveer and his powers. This adds to the misery of Baalveer because unfortunately, this undisciplined, non-believer kid is the real successor of Baalveer. What follows is the challenging journey of Baalveer and his team to make Vivaan the next Baalveer with some eccentric characters, childish games and lots of magic on earth and the respective loks, while the imminent threat of Timnasa and the mystery behind her origin continues to play a part.

#baalveerreturns #baalveer

snippet.title: Baalveer Returns - Ep 332 - Full Episode - 31st March, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Baalveer Returns: 
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/baalveer-returns-1700000071/timnasa-stronger-than-anticipated-1000113383?

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Episode 332 : Timnasa  Is Unbeatable
--------------------------------------------------------
The timer disappears, and the sky clears out as everyone feels better. Soon, the red diamond gets back in shape as Timnasa claims that she is unbeatable. With only 50 minutes left on the clock, can Baalveer save the world?


More Useful Links :
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV

About Baalveer Returns:
---------------------------------------
After Pari-Lok, the home of benevolent fairies was destroyed by a mighty evil, Timnasa. Baalveer takes shelter in Veer-Lok along with a few Paris who had survived the massacre. There, under the guidance of the wise old white lion Shaurya, Baalveer and Pari's are instructed to find the successor of Baalveer at the earliest, since he was immensely injured during the war and will need to team up a new Baalveer to further fight the battle with evil. This search for the next Baalveer takes them to earth, where they discover Vivan, who lives in an old society of Mumbai. He is the naughtiest kid, an ardent fan of Salman Khan, and a non-believer of Baalveer and his powers. This adds to the misery of Baalveer because unfortunately, this undisciplined, non-believer kid is the real successor of Baalveer. What follows is the challenging journey of Baalveer and his team to make Vivaan the next Baalveer with some eccentric characters, childish games, and lots of magic on earth and the respective Loks, while the imminent threat of Timnasa and the mystery behind her origin continues to play a part.

snippet.title: 33 Useful Life Hacks For Smart PARENTS
snippet.description:
If your kids have been giving you a hard time lately, we sympathize with you. Being a parent is not an easy task, but it’s so rewarding! So, today we have some hacks we want to share with you to give you a helping hand. You’ll learn a few quick fixes for everyday problems, DIY versions of necessary devices, and cute ideas for outfits. Toddlers can be sneaky and quick, so we have a DIY playpen you can use to keep them in one place while during playtime.

Not knowing what to wear can be a huge time-drainer. So we’ll show you an awesome hack to help you save time when getting your little ones ready. No baby monitor? No problem! You can use your tablet and your phone to set up a monitoring system to keep an eye on your kiddos. Ironing mishaps can happen you anyone, but that burned shirt might make a great kiddie apron!

TIMESTAMPS:

1:10 – DIY playpen
4:43 – Outfit organizer
7:34 – Tablet and phone baby monitor
10:36 – DIY apron
11:53 – DIY tutu

We advise adult supervision and care at all times.

This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. It is the viewer's responsibility to use judgment, care and precautions if one plans to replicate.

snippet.title: Tapu Sena Ki Masti | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | Tapu Sena Special | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh
On-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAP
Costume Designer: Alka Mehta
Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt
Sound Recordist: Shakeel Mansuri 
Cameraman: Aamir Virani
Production Head: Arvind Marchande
Production Controler: Vinod Shishupal
Background Music: Sunil Patni
Online Editors: Vishal Tambe, Sandeep Singh 
Executive Producer: Jatin Yogesh Bajaj
Editor: Dinesh Gosavi, Kaushal Mistry, Devang Modi, Vinod Maurya
Creative Supervision: Krunal Khakhkhar
Operation Head: Sohil Ramani

Directors: Harshad Joshi, Malav Suresh Rajda

Television Adaptation and Designed By: Asit Kumarr Modi
